violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean deposits in big ice machine.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean utility cart. -Clean top of dishwasher.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Boxes of single use items stored on floor in dry storage.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Walls behind dishwasher need cleaned. -Floors below soda dispenser need cleaned.
